name: Main Dish Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 lb New Potatoes, Cooked, Peeled and Diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cottage cheese, sour cream, mustard, sugar, salt, and pepper in a salad bowl.
2. Add the potatoes, ham, green onions, celery, and eggs to the mixture.
3. Toss everything together until well combined.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for several hours or until well chilled.
To Serve:
Arrange the salad on a bed of lettuce leaves and sprinkle with paprika.
